entry.name: connectionName
entry.label: Named Adelie connection for this widget instance (empty uses KCM default)

entry.name: selectedService
entry.label: Selected D-Bus service for this widget instance

entry.name: transportMode
entry.label: Transport mode for widget helper (ws or dbus)

entry.name: wsSubject
entry.label: Subject used when bootstrapping WS JWT via D-Bus

entry.name: userAvatarPath
entry.label: Optional user avatar path or source URL

entry.name: maxSessionAgeDays
entry.label: Hide previous sessions older than this many days (0 disables filtering)

entry.name: maxRenderedMessages
entry.label: Number of latest messages to load in chat view (0 loads full conversation)
